title: Run ledger — the conductor's durable state file at orchestration/runs/<slug>/ledger.json
description: The OBJECT that frontier.py consumes (frontier reads ledger.slices): a campaign_slug plus a `slices` array of ledger-entry records. Each record's full shape is in ledger-entry.schema.json; this wrapper asserts the fields frontier.py and resume depend on. This is the durable, resumable source of truth — NOT Linear status.

integration_branch.description: the campaign working trunk (integration/<slug>) cut off main once at §0; slices merge INTO it, never into main. Deleted at §5b after the squash to main.

campaign_pr.description: the single babysit-pr integration->main PR (the heavy gate); null until §5b opens it

campaign_merge_sha.description: the squash-merge commit on main — the whole campaign as one commit; null until the §5b merge is confirmed
